descriptions.value: You are the king of The God's Chain
You are a Good Supporter
You are a Good Player

You are Powerful.Great job.
Being a hero is easy but being a Powerful Hero is difficult.
You are a saviour.Great job.

-70-something.
-Strong proponent of communism.
-Drives the same car his whole life.
-Always tells the same war stories but was never in a war. Pointing that out will most likely end in a fight.

-Divorced twice.
-Takes off his shirt when drunk.
-Was probably in prison.
-Trains with wooden logs in the woods.

-Chronic smoker.
-Unemployed but always wears a suit.
-Tends to disappear every now and then.
-Hates bears.

-Prolific jewellery and cellphone salesman.
-Always on his phone.
-Flirts with any and all females.
-Probably killed a man.

-Small but deadly
-Very bad hearing.
-Always has a fresh batch of cabbage soup for you.
-You never visit but she still loves you.

-Very civilized.
-Used to be in a circus before he ran away.
-Raised by the local people.
-Hangs around bars and dumpsters.

The most awesome, lovable and sympathetic evil floating brain you will ever know. He just wants to escape and have some fun. And who can blame him?  That straitjacket doesn't look too comfortable.

These guys aren't too bright, but they can be very useful. Besides, what else are they going to do? You might as well put them to work for you and give some meaning to their otherwise boring existences.
Youthful optimism and compassion can be great when it works to your benefit. And shouldn't all medical staff's first priority be to help their patients?

You summoned them from the netherrealm upon the bloody corpse of your slaughtered enemies, and now they will serve you. Controlling the souls of the dead isn't an exact science but it's great when it works.
The great old interdimensional oracle of knowledge and wisdom. There's no better source of information than a huge, bloodsucking arthropod.
Stationary vegetation may not be particularly helpful,  but you make friends were you can.
She did not know what to think, but she thought it anyway.
Say, Oskar, how about here?
As they approached the present, the future only wept.
Spread thou word as gospel, for the Prophet of Time hath returned!
Or so the legend goes.
There are wounds that never show on the body that are deeper and more hurtful than anything that bleeds.
A human being can survive almost anything, as long as she sees the end in sight.
I can't eat and I can't sleep. I'm not doing well in terms of being a functional human, you know?
If you know someone who’s depressed, please resolve never to ask them why.
Noble deeds and hot baths are the best cures for depression.
Arris is the protagonist of Vindictive Drive, she survives the terrors of her hellish childhood just to grow up as a broken and bloodthirsty murderer who only wants to get revenge at any cost.
To make up for the lack of combat proficency and experience, she will need all kinds of tools, tactics and treacherous intent.
Your worst enemy or your best friend, depending on how tables turn, an expert assassin with inmense firepower, even unarmed.
Finding something sweet in the middle of the merciless cold storm of war is one. Good people are like gold dust in this corrupted scenario.
Choosen to be tools of revenge, real and very human people with their strenghts and weaknesses in the wrong place and moment. They count on each other and no one else.
He likes straw... And sleep.

descriptions.value: The Renault FT was the most revolutionary during the Great War for it's rotating turret design. All modern tanks can trace their lineage to this beautiful piece of French Machinery.

A British Soldier with his standard issue rifle, also known as the Lee-Enfield.
A French Soldier with his standard issue rifle, also known as the Lebel.
A British Soldier with his standard issue rifle, also known as the Lee-Enfield.

Keep an eye on where the Tracking Laser is. The instant it gets line of sight on you, you'll be dealt a fatal blow. Keep behind walls and push obstacles into its path to remain safe!

descriptions.name: Tracking Laser
descriptions.type: Won't You Be My Laser? Trading Card

descriptions.value: The Scanning Laser will continuously revolve on the spot, allowing you to creep past it unscathed... as long as you plan your movements carefully.

descriptions.name: Scanning Laser
descriptions.type: Won't You Be My Laser? Trading Card

descriptions.value: Static Lasers were built cheap to increase quantities. You won't get hurt unless you run headfirst into one, but watch out - there might not be much opportunity for an alternative!

descriptions.name: Static Laser
descriptions.type: Won't You Be My Laser? Trading Card

descriptions.value: Even cheaper-built than Static Lasers, Landmine Lasers point directly upwards, meaning they only hurt if you walk straight onto them. Rumour has it that these lasers only entered manufacture because the security guys wanted to combine weaponry with their love of futuristic disco action - the colour of laser they produce changes continuously.

descriptions.name: Landmine Laser
descriptions.type: Won't You Be My Laser? Trading Card

descriptions.value: Littered around each vault are a number of these quirky sticks. Part of a game in which you throw a handful of them onto the ground and then take it in turns to pick one up without agitating the rest of the pile. It's like jacks, but without any dexterity. Or pogs, but without the bit when your best friend cries when you play for keeps and win her favourite one.

descriptions.name: Pick-Up Stick
descriptions.type: Won't You Be My Laser? Trading Card

descriptions.value: The first boss of Broken Armor.  Fires projectiles that split into smaller ones.
The second boss of Broken Armor.  Throws bones everywhere and suddenly gains bursts of speed.
The 7th boss of Broken Armor.  Fires a near constant barrage of projectiles.  Hide behind blocks or else.
The 5th boss of Broken Armor.  Does nothing itself but continually spawns green slimes until it is destroyed.  Green slimes fire poison projectiles.
The protagonist of Broken Armor.  Throws all of his possessions at enemies.
If anybody wants to dry out this town, they better be ready for one hell of a fight!
The craziest man in the world has escaped!
Your gonna need some armour!
Boston's local Air Force!
Bob has been found!
Boston Vice!
The Mayor doesn't want an incident!
Have you any idea how much it cost to insure this thing!
A typical all round fighter, A mainstay of the planetary defence force.
Swarms of khanda are to be avoided at all times, fast and nimble.
Fast attack craft, Make sure you have plenty of shields before engaging.
Scarab's fly in tight formations and are able to change direction in ways other ships cannot.
It is believed that the scorpion was names after a long extinct earth creature, Many believe it to be a myth.
Lewis Higgins, known to some as "Doc Apocalypse" lives up to the name when his Cloudbuster experiment seems to go wrong, plunging the planet into catastrophe...
Sheriff Grimes tries to maintain some order in Serenity but finds his time eaten up by a family feud with his son...
Elzebeth, partner of Doc Apocalypse, cousin of Nikolai Tesla, finds herself mixed up in the apocalypse and imprisoned in Area 51...
Tobias "Tachy" Higgins is determined to find a way out of Area 51 when he unwittingly uses alien technology to trigger a mass extermination...
Doctor Bishop is a scientist and member of Third Alternative. He has called on Lewis Higgins after making a strange discovery near the North Pole...
Father Camden, a survivor of the apocalypse, hopes to rebuild the Serenity church and give it a nice new name...
Gaius trades information for priceless post-apocalyptic junk whilst his mutant guard Girder watches over proceedings...
Eli is a survivor who escaped the brutality of the militia to start a new life in Serenity. He now resides near Doc's collapsed house, which he uses as his toilet...

The SATA 300, a fighter. The fighter is for the soldiers on the front-line. It can afflict high damage, has a proper hull for the defense and has a good speed. An overall good spaceship with balanced properties.

The Avenger, a fighter. The fighter is for the soldiers on the front-line. It can afflict high damage, has a proper hull for the defense and has a good speed. An overall good spaceship with balanced properties.
Cydionia HS, a highspeed ship. Highspeed spaceships are extra small, very fast but extra vulnerable. The class ability is a special temporary boost in speed.

The Falconizer, a support ship. Support ships have average stats. A bit more Armour but are perfect for supporting your team. This class has more cargo space for supplies like: rockets, energy capsules, and health packs. Support ships have the ability to drop support packages for their team mates. If a team member pick one up, the supplier of the package receive XP
The lupos, a highspeed. Highspeed spaceships are extra small, very fast but extra vulnerable. The class ability is a special temporary boost in speed.
The Nirvinus, a stealth ship. The stealth ships are fast, hard to see and are very flexible in maneuverability. This class ability gives the player the power to have a temporary camouflage.

ST Phobos, a Support ship. Support ships have average stats. A bit more Armour but are perfect for supporting your team. This class has more cargo space for supplies like: rockets, energy capsules, and health packs. Support ships have the ability to drop support packages for their team mates. If a team member pick one up, the supplier of the package receive XP.

The Prometheus, a tank. A tank is significantly slower, larger, has less maneuverability but has a amazing hull which gives the ship a good defense system. This class has the ability to temporary increase the defense.
The Raven, a stealth ship. The stealth ships are fast, hard to see and are very flexible in maneuverability. This class has the ability to give the player the power to have a temporary camouflage.

The Titan! A massive tank. A tank is significantly slower, larger, has less maneuverability but has a amazing hull which gives the ship a good defense system. This class has the ability to temporary increase the defense.
Two is always better then one.

descriptions.value: In fact, my name is Max. Nice to meet you! In fact, I'm ten years old and I have an Autism Spectrum Disorder. But it's Ok because I'm happy! Oh! And I made this game with my dad!

descriptions.name: In fact, my name is Max
descriptions.type: Max, an Autistic Journey Trading Card
descriptions.market_name: In fact, my name is Max

descriptions.value: In fact, Jimmy's my big brother. He's very good at playing video games and sometimes, he even lets me play too! I know he loves me very much and protects me from... aliens? Yeah! Aliens!

descriptions.name: Jimmy has a mustache!
descriptions.type: Max, an Autistic Journey Trading Card
